apigateway.gatewayresponse.ResponseParam.Docs: The response parameters (paths, query strings, and headers) for the response. Duplicates not allowed.

apigateway.gatewayresponse.ResponseTempl.Docs: The response templates for the response. Duplicates not allowed.

apigateway.gatewayresponse.ResponseType.Docs: The response type. For valid values, see [GatewayResponse](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/api-reference/resource/gateway-response/) in the *API Gateway API Reference*.

apigateway.gatewayresponse.StatusCode.Docs: The HTTP status code for the response.
